chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 4511 of 2017 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.19516/2017 2. For hearing of main case 22.04.2025 Mr. Gazain Z. Magsi, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Faheem Raza Khuhro, advocate for respondent Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General Learned counsel for respondent files statement along with letter stating that the notice for denovo proceedings, subject matter herein, stands withdrawn. In view hereof learned counsel for the petitioner states that the petition has served its purpose, hence, may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
